race.name: Larch Hills Loppet
race.tagline: British Columbia's interior loppet through the Larch Hills — a community-driven citizen race in the Shuswap region.

climate.description: Reliable snow conditions in the Larch Hills above Salmon Arm. Temperatures typically -10°C to 0°C in late January.
challenges: Variable snow conditions depending on elevation
Possible freezing rain at lower elevations

course.primary: Trail course through the Larch Hills Nordic trail system above Shuswap Lake. Mixed forest terrain with moderate climbing.
features: Views over Shuswap Lake and surrounding mountains

nordic_lab_rating.score_note: A well-established community loppet in BC's interior with good trails but small field.

history.summary: The Larch Hills Loppet is a community-driven Nordic ski event in the Shuswap region of British Columbia. The Larch Hills trail system is maintained by volunteers and offers some of the best Nordic skiing in BC's interior.
notable_facts: Larch Hills trail system is one of BC's best community-maintained Nordic areas
Shuswap region has a strong Nordic skiing tradition
Volunteer-run event with dedicated local community

youtube_data.search_query: Larch Hills Loppet cross country ski race Salmon Arm

videos.title: Reino Keski-Salmi Loppet 2026
videos.description:
The 42st annual Reino Keski-Salmi Loppet held at Larch Hills. For more information visit https://skilarchhills.ca/

Video: Sarah & Adam Lauzé
GoPro Footage - Trevor Wallensteen
www.sarahlauze.com

Music: The View Between Villages - Noah Kahan
Step Out - José González
Friends - Matchbox 20
videos.curation_reason: Most recent skier-filmed POV content of the actual Larch Hills Loppet race with GoPro footage.

videos.title: Larch Hills Nordics - Silver Star Camp 2013
videos.description: Larch Hills Nordic Jr Racing Team 10-11 year olds at ski camp ski and dance to Katy Perry "Roar" (Album:  Prism, 2013, Capitol Records).  This activity and organization are not for profit and volunteer led and the purpose of this video is to inspire other kids to try cross country skiing.

videos.title: Larch Hills 2010
videos.description: Strathcona ski cub at Larch Hills. Soundtrack Black Eyed Peas, Where is The Love Elephunk

videos.title: Rotary at Larch Hills
videos.description:
Lisa and I are members of the Rotary club  of Salmon Arm and are helping out at the Loppet at  Larch Hills Ski Acres. This is the annual Reno Keski Salmi Loppet. Which is a cross country ski race for all ages. Race distances are from 1km through 34km. The Rotary clubs of Salmon Arm cook and serve beef on a bun with onions and Hamburgers and Hotdogs to all of the event racers and volunteers. We had a great turnout of the Rotarians and we all had a great time.

 Please remember Subscribe and hit the bell for notification of our up coming videos.

Email: Sla.startlivingagain@outliving.com
Instagram: @sla.startlivingagain
Facebook:@sla.startlivingagain

videos.title: Reino Keski-Salmi Loppet 2019
videos.description:
The 35th Annual Reino Keski-Salmi Loppet held at Larch Hills. For more information visit https://skilarchhills.ca/loppet/. 

Video: Sarah & Adam Lauzé, Trevor Wallensteen 
www.sarahlauze.com

quotes.text: We served about 160 pounds of beef to 600 people - beef on a bun and hot dogs and burgers. The really best part is when people did their 15 or 20 or 30 kilometres and they show up here and they turn in their ticket they get a beef in a bun and then they say thank you to us.
